column2: Keiki Cloning Paste Special Cytokinin Formula Gives a New Baby Orchid (Keiki) in Weeks-Can Be Used on All Kinds of Orchids and Also House Plants (0.33oz)
column3:
• HAVE YOUR BABY ORCHID AT HOME, Keiki paste contains a growth hormone called cytokinin. When the paste is applied to the nodes, the orchid is stimulated for the formation of keiki (baby orchid).
  • EASY TO APPLY, You can apply the paste in minutes by following the illustrated instructions on the package. It is recommended to apply one node on each branch.
  • SEPARATE YOUR BABY ORCHID, After your keiki has grown enough and has given at least 3 roots, you can separate it from the main orchid if you wish. Make sure the roots are at least 2 inches long before you separate. You can plant the baby orchid in a separate pot or the pot with the mother orchid.
  • USE ON DIFFERENT PLANTS, You can also use the paste on other kinds of plants like Hoya, Monstera, Kalanchoe, Stephania and Violet. Apply a small amount of the paste on the growing parts of the plants.
  • GREAT GIFT FOR YOUR LOVED ONES, Applying paste to your plants at home with your children and observing the results can increase their interest in science. You can also gift this All-in-one package to your loved ones. The box contains 10 ml keiki cloning paste and a few wooden sticks to apply the paste.
column5: Home & Garden > Lawn & Garden > Gardening > Fertilizers
